reviews.comment:
Excelente la atención. El micro llegó de madrugada nos dejaron quedar, la dueña del lugar un amor y los empleados también. Dato súper importante: tienen una máquina para agua caliente gratis.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. The bus arrived in the early hours of the morning and they let us stay. The owner was lovely, and so were the employees. Super important tip: they have a free hot water machine.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5d2M3eXd3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Todo bárbaro, el único detalle negativo es que no tienen WiFi en la playa y no pude pagar con la aplicación. Lamentablemente estaba sin datos.

Por lo demás. Muy cordial la atención.

(Translated by Google)
Everything was great, the only downside was the lack of Wi-Fi on the beach, so I couldn't pay with the app. Unfortunately, I was out of data.

Otherwise, the service was very friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5d1k2MTJRRRAB

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Atención estrictamente ordenada. Atentos! Hay que hacer una cola sobre el cordón de la vereda y no está perfectamente indicado.

(Translated by Google)
Strictly organized attention. Be careful! You have to queue along the sidewalk curb, and it's not clearly marked.
